     The Numbers Business Report

Dirty Grandpa (2016)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $35,593,113Details
International Box Office $69,485,336
Worldwide Box Office $105,078,449
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $5,762,766
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $3,836,333
Total $9,599,099
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Jason Kelly is one week away from marrying his boss's uber-controlling daughter, putting him on the fast track for a partnership at the law firm. However, when the straight-laced Jason is tricked into driving his foul-mouthed grandfather, Dick, to Daytona for spring break, his pending nuptials are suddenly in jeopardy. Between riotous frat parties, bar fights, and an epic night of karaoke, Dick is on a quest to live his life to the fullest and bring Jason along for the ride. Ultimately, on the wildest journey of their lives, "dirty" Grandpa and his uptight grandson discover they can learn from one another and form the bond they never had.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$11,111,875 (31.2% of total gross)
Legs:3.20 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:33.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$11,500,000 (worldwide box office is 9.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,912 opening theaters/2,912 max. theaters, 4.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $49,213,140

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: January 22nd, 2016 (Wide) by Lionsgate
International Releases: January 21st, 2016 (Wide) (Iraq)
January 21st, 2016 (Wide) (Oman)
January 21st, 2016 (Wide) (Portugal)
January 21st, 2016 (Wide) (Russia (CIS))
January 21st, 2016 (Wide) (Slovakia)
Video Release: April 26th, 2016 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for crude sexual content throughout, graphic nudity, and for language and drug use.
(Rating bulletin 2401 (Cert #50150), 11/25/2015)
Running Time: 97 minutes
Plot point: Generational Conflict, Road Trip, Widow/Widower
Social setting: Slobs vs. Snobs, Spring Break
Subgenre: Buddy Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: QED International, Lionsgate, BillBlock Media, Josephson Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Jason Kelly is one week away from marrying his boss's uber-controlling daughter, putting him on the fast track for a partnership at the law firm. However, when the straight-laced Jason is tricked into driving his foul-mouthed grandfather, Dick, to Daytona for spring break, his pending nuptials are suddenly in jeopardy. Between riotous frat parties, bar fights, and an epic night of karaoke, Dick is on a quest to live his life to the fullest and bring Jason along for the ride. Ultimately, on the wildest journey of their lives, "dirty" Grandpa and his uptight grandson discover they can learn from one another and form the bond they never had.
